From: 3 files → To: 54 files (51 new files added)

================================================================================
CRITICAL BREAKING CHANGES
================================================================================

1. PATH CHANGE (BREAKING):
   OLD: python recalc.py file.xlsx
   NEW: python scripts/recalc.py file.xlsx
   
   ACTION REQUIRED: Update all references to recalc.py in scripts/docs

2. NEW DEPENDENCIES NEEDED:
   pip install defusedxml lxml
   
   Current status:
   - openpyxl: ✓ Installed (v3.1.5)
   - defusedxml: ✗ NOT installed
   - lxml: ✗ NOT installed

================================================================================
WHAT CHANGED
================================================================================

PRESERVED (Excel functionality):
✓ Formula recalculation works the same way
✓ Error detection unchanged
✓ JSON output format identical
✓ API signature compatible

NEW FEATURES ADDED:
+ DOCX/PPTX pack/unpack/validate
+ XSD schema validation (39 schema files)
+ Track changes support for DOCX
+ LibreOffice sandbox handling
+ Improved directory structure

REMOVED:
✗ Nothing - all Excel features preserved

================================================================================
DEPLOYMENT STATUS
================================================================================

RECOMMENDATION: ⚠️  SAFE TO DEPLOY WITH PRECAUTIONS

Before deploying:
1. Install dependencies: pip install defusedxml lxml
2. Update all "recalc.py" references to "scripts/recalc.py"
3. Test with sample Excel file
4. Update user documentation

Backup available at:
xlsx_backup_20260318_143716/

To rollback if needed:
cd /path/to/claude-skills
rm -rf xlsx
mv xlsx_backup_20260318_143716 xlsx

================================================================================
MIGRATION COMMANDS
================================================================================

Update script calls:
  sed -i 's|python recalc.py|python scripts/recalc.py|g' *.sh

Install dependencies:
  pip install defusedxml lxml

Test the upgrade:
  cd /path/to/xlsx
  python3 scripts/recalc.py test.xlsx
